title: Cute Rabbits
description: This pack aims to achive the more cuteness of rabbits and rabbits are the cutest pet anyone could have
body:
🌸 Cute Rabbits Texture Pack

Bring a softer, more adorable feel to your world in Minecraft with this Cute Rabbits Texture Pack.

This pack redesigns every rabbit into a charming, pastel-toned companion with:

🐇 Smoother, cleaner textures
🎨 Soft, calming color palettes
💖 More expressive and lovable faces
🌿 A cozy, aesthetic vibe that fits perfectly with nature builds

Each rabbit variant has been carefully crafted to feel unique while still fitting naturally into the game. From soft browns to snowy whites and gentle creams, the designs make every encounter feel special and relaxing.

Whether you're building a peaceful garden, a cottagecore village, or just love cute mobs, these rabbits will make your world feel warmer and more alive.
